## What died and when

One-line summary:

## New entry checklist

- [ ] I ran `npm run validate` locally.
- [ ] I filled every required field.
- [ ] I wrote an original eulogy.
- [ ] I provided a real source URL.
- [ ] I checked that the site still builds without errors.

## Existing entry update checklist

- [ ] I included evidence for the correction.
- [ ] I updated only the fields that needed to change.
- [ ] I re-ran `npm run validate`.

Reminder: eulogies must be original writing. Do not copy them from articles, announcements, or generated text.
